To our valued customers.

The Sampling Lounge and Museum at our St James's Street store will be closed for refurbishment from Monday 20th April until Thursday 7th May. Our store will be open as usual, and our Sampling Lounge at Harrods remains open.

 We apologise for the inconvenience caused.

    • Hoyo de Monterrey Le Hoyo De San Juan

    Hoyo de Monterrey Le Hoyo De San Juan

    From £53.00
    In stock
    *Please note our website prices vary from our prices in store.
    +
    -
    Add to Wish List
    • Strength : 1 out of 5
    • Vitola : Geniales
    • Length : 5 7/8”
    • Min Smoking Time : 50-60 minutes
    • Ring Gauge : 54
    • Origin : Cuba
    Description

    Mild, yet outrageously flavourful, this cigar is one of Hoyo's finest. Meticulously balanced, cedar and earth at it’s base in equal measure, with a vaguely sweet note to it’s wrapper, the smoke gently transitions into a spicy, leathery finish, and keeps a spot-on coolness throughout. With a wider ring gauge than the Epicure, The Hoyo San Juan will take up about an hour of your time, but, ultimately, it's a wonderfully flavoured smoke.
